title: Nusrah Azeez - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Nusrah Azeez - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All People
Nusrah Azeez
Administrative Coordinator
Education
Education
BA in Communications, the University of Massachusetts, Amherst
Biography
Biography
Nusrah Azeez is an administrative coordinator of operations at the Khoury College of Computer Sciences at Northeastern University. They earned their bachelor’s in communications from the University of Massachusetts, Amherst.
They help
Khoury students plan their coursework and direct students to various university resources and enjoy the supportive community and opportunity to grow in their role.
Azeez grew up in Nigeria.

Staff
